overview.title: Demo Spec — Parse / Format / Integrate
overview.description: A minimal per-spec SDD v2 fixture used by end-to-end pipeline integration tests. The fixture describes three epics that together implement a tiny number parser + formatter pair plus an integration layer. The domain content is intentionally trivial — the purpose of this spec is to exercise the per-spec artifact layout (specs/<spec-id>/...) and the downstream execution skills that consume it.

excludes.reason: Any real-world parsing (locales, scientific notation, BigInt)

constraint.title: Zero External Dependencies
constraint.description: Node.js standard library only — matches arcforge project norm.
